metadata.description: Marketing skills and tools for agency workflows - Google Ads, SEO, CRO, content, and more.

plugins.name: lhm-marketing-hub
plugins.description: Structured marketing orchestrator — pre-flight client folder check, auto-onboarding, mandatory context load, skill routing, and enforced output discipline.

plugins.name: lhm-wordpress-hub
plugins.description: Guided WordPress website build system — phased delivery from client intake through SEO, content, design, WordPress build, and ops hardening.

plugins.name: lhm-content-engine
plugins.description: Automated multi-asset content pipeline for allied health clinics — CSV-driven batch processing, blog generation, GMB social posts, anti-AI refinement, Google Doc publishing, and tracking updates.

plugins.name: lhm-learn
plugins.description: Session learning capture — scans conversation context, identifies skill learnings and client profile updates, writes to the correct LEARNED.md and client_profile.md files.
